evals.name: happy-path-june-2026
evals.prompt: Draft the next IC meeting pack — June 2026. Latest portfolio data is in Y:\brooker_database\cio\portfolio\Apr\ and the latest meeting was IC #2 on 12 May 2026. Produce all three artifacts (markdown twin, docx, pptx) and surface any source gaps.
evals.expected_output: Three staging drafts (md/docx/pptx) covering all 9 topics with source citations. Source gaps for Sukhothai monthly + non-listed monthlies surfaced as escalation flags. Confidence reflects stale Feb dashboard adjustment.

evals.name: stale-data-multi-gap-july-2026
evals.prompt: Generate the IC monthly report for July 2026. The Feb 2026 dashboard is still the latest available and the Sukhothai fund letter isn't in the directory. Apply the stale-data adjustment recipe and surface every source gap.
evals.expected_output: Three artifacts produced with confidence ≤0.80, stale_data_recipe_applied=true, Feb dashboard baseline + delta applied to tokens-only line items, [TBD — verify] placeholders for missing sources (Sukhothai, possibly non-listed), escalation flags listing each gap with severity.

evals.name: partial-topic-refresh-dat-only
evals.prompt: Refresh just the DAT MTM section (Topic 8 — Digital Asset Division) using the April Coin Weekly Report. Don't regenerate the whole pack. Produce the updated Topic 8 markdown only.
evals.expected_output: Single markdown section for Topic 8 with refreshed MTM (USD + Baht), per-token holdings, monthly/YTD/inception percentages, FX disclosure, BNB 50.4% classification caveat. No docx/pptx generated. Source: Coin Weekly Report April only.

notes: Test cases drafted before user review of skill v1.0. Assertions to be added once user confirms the skill draft and is ready for the formal eval loop.
